approval_phrase_required: APPROVE IBM RUNTIME STAGE133 LIVE RUN

excluded: a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: non-live parity check between Stage 157 approval records and Stage 133 authorized commands
pre-execution check that target provider-result files are absent or empty
non-secret job-shard and result-path readiness for the first-provider live run

next_gate: Only after explicit approval, execute the authorized Stage 133 live-submit commands whose Stage 158 records are ready; after execution, rerun Stage 115 with provider_scope=ibm_runtime.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
